channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Harris and Trump offer new details about policies and strategy in dueling interviews
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — As the presidential race moves into its final weeks, Democrat Kamala Harris and Republican Donald Trump embarked on an interview blitz that offered new details about their policy priorities and their political strategies.
item.dc:creator: STEVE PEOPLES, COLLEEN LONG and NICHOLAS RICCARDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Harris interview with Fox News showcases a change in strategy for Democrats with network
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Kamala Harris ' interview with Fox News Channel's Bret Baier on Wednesday is the latest indication that Democrats during this campaign are increasingly willing to engage with a network well-stocked with supporters of opponent Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BAUDER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump was asked to name three nice things about Harris. His response sounded like hers
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — Donald Trump on Wednesday was asked to name three virtues of his Democratic opponent Kamala Harris, a week after Harris was asked to do the same for the Republican nominee. His answer sounded a lot like hers.
item.dc:creator: ADRIANA GOMEZ LICON and THOMAS BEAUMONT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: A federal judge halts an Alabama program that purged thousands of legal voters
item.description: A federal judge is halting an Alabama program that made thousands of legal voters inactive ahead of the November elections.
item.dc:creator: Safiyah Riddle, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Harris holds 2-point edge in tight North Carolina race: Poll
item.description: Vice President Harris holds a 2-point lead over former President Trump among likely voters in North Carolina, according to a poll released Wednesday. The Quinnipiac University poll found the vice president garnering the support of 49 percent of likely voters to the former president’s 47 percent.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump calls himself 'father of IVF'
item.description: “I want to talk about IVF. I’m the father of IVF, so I want to hear this question,” he said before one woman spoke.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, NewsNation

item.title: North Carolina prepares to launch in-person early voting with mountain areas still recovering from Helene
item.description: North Carolina election officials are scrambling to expand their early voting programs to address fallout from Hurricane Helene.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Violent convict's taxpayer-funded sex change challenged by state AG after judge's approval
item.description: Indiana Attorney General Todd Rokita plans to appeal a federal judge's decision to allow baby-killer inmate to have a sex reassignment surgery on the taxpayer's dime.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump: Black and Hispanic voters who vote for Harris 'gotta have your head examined'
item.description: “Any African American or Hispanic– and you know how well I’m doing there – that votes for Kamala, you gotta have your head examined,” Trump said.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, NewsNation

item.title: Liz Cheney jumps into House races — for Democrats
item.description: Former Rep. Liz Cheney (R-Wyo.) is taking her anti-Trump crusade to the congressional battlefield, endorsing Democrats in a pair of contested House races in a sign that she sees the lower chamber as a potential check on former President Trump if he wins a second term in the White House.
item.dc:creator: Mike Lillis, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Laken Riley Act sponsor blasts Bill Clinton's claim about Georgia student's death
item.description: Sen. Katie Britt criticized former President Bill Clinton for bringing up Laken Riley and noting that her death may have been prevented by proper border vetting.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: From Christmas City to the coal mines: An inside look at the Dems' ground game in PA's crucial Lehigh Valley
item.description: Allentown Mayor Matthew Tuerk and Bethlehem state lawmaker Lisa Boscola offered their take on the election and what they are seeing from constituents in Tuesday interviews.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Nebraska court allows voter registrations from people with felony convictions
item.description: Nebraskans with felony convictions may register to vote after the state's highest court ruled Wednesday that a top election official had no authority to deem a law restoring those rights unconstitutional.
item.dc:creator: Ella Lee, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Harris teaming up with top anti-Trump Republican ahead of Bret Baier Fox News interview
item.description: Vice President Kamala Harris to sit down for an interview with Fox News Bret Baier on 'Special Report' after teaming up with top anti-Trump Republicans at a campaign event in battleground Pennsylvania
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: North Carolina Democrat leader resigns after arrest for allegedly stealing Trump roadside signs
item.description: Moore County, North Carolina, Democratic Party Chair Lowell Simon resigned after admitting to stealing pro-Trump political signs.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Harris campaign celebrates after Georgia judge blocks hand-count ballot rule
item.description: Georgia Democrats and the Harris campaign are celebrating after a state judge temporarily blocked a measure that would require the hand-counting of ballots after they are cast.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The Latest: Harris and Trump pivot to turnout as early voting begins
item.description: With just 21 days remaining to cast votes this presidential season, Kamala Harris and Donald Trump are scrambling to win over key constituents as well as the other party's voters.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Harris holds small national lead as Trump increases his edge on the economy: poll
item.description: Former President Trump extended his lead on the economy, but Vice President Kamala Harris continues to hold a slim lead in national polls.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Melania Trump to release 'Collector's Edition' of memoir featuring images photographed by former first lady
item.description: EXCLUSIVE: Former First Lady Melania Trump is releasing a special collector’s edition of her new memoir containing exclusive images she photographed at the White House and around the world.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Iowa emerges as key battleground in race for the House
item.description: In their fight to flip the House, Democrats are eyeing gains in what may seem an unlikely spot: Iowa. Two GOP seats in the Hawkeye State have emerged as true battlegrounds in the final stretch of the campaign, as some election forecasters have moved Reps.
item.dc:creator: Mike Lillis, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mormon voters set to play critical role in swing states
item.description: Mormon voters are increasingly seen as a crucial swing vote in the presidential election, with both Vice President Harris and former President Trump stepping up their outreach to the demographic in multiple battleground states.
item.dc:creator: Caroline Vakil, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Rufus Wainwright blasts Trump playing 'Hallelujah' at town hall
item.description: The 51-year-old singer said Tuesday that he was "horrified" to learn his 2001 cover of Leonard Cohen's "Hallelujah" was part of the playlist at the Trump campaign event a night earlier.
item.dc:creator: Judy Kurtz, NewsNation

item.title: Small business disaster loan program is out of money until new funds are approved
item.description: The SBA’s disaster loan program has run out of money, it announced on Tuesday. The agency expects to receive new funding from Congress, and will continue to accept applications in the meantime.
item.dc:creator: Andrea Hsu and Miguel Macias, MPR News

item.title: Harris outreach to Black men: New policy, interviews, meetings
item.description: On the economic front, Harris intends to provide one million loans that would be fully forgivable of up to $20,000 to Black entrepreneurs.
item.dc:creator: Jackie Koppell, NewsNation

item.title: Tillis warns conservatives’ 'unwise' reforms would 'weaken' Senate GOP
item.description: North Carolina Sen. Thom Tillis (R) circulated a “Dear Colleague” letter Tuesday warning that some of the reforms being pushed by Senate conservatives would only weaken the next Senate Republican leader and cause the same chaos that is plaguing the House Republican majority.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, NewsNation

item.title: Trump rally arrest: Vem Miller says it's 'false allegations'
item.description: A self-proclaimed "kindergarten kid when it comes to gun," Miller claims the charges against him are all "false.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, NewsNation

item.title: Giant pandas will arrive at D.C.'s National Zoo this week
item.description: After an 11-month wait, giant pandas will populate the zoo once again. A pair of pandas, which left China on FedEx's "Panda Express" cargo jet, are expected to arrive in the D.C. area on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Willem Marx, MPR News

item.title: VP hopefuls make Midwest push as Vance pops in on Minnesota, Walz swings through Wisconsin
item.description: A near-meeting on the tarmac at the Minneapolis-St. Paul airport opens the campaign week for Tim Walz and JD Vance, the vice presidential nominees on their party tickets.
item.dc:creator: Dana Ferguson and Clay Masters, MPR News

item.title: Native Voters could swing Arizona. Both parties want their votes.
item.description: Both Republicans and Democrats are trying to marshal Native American voters in Arizona, which could prove decisive to winning the key state.
item.dc:creator: Ximena Bustillo, MPR News

item.title: Election 2024: Races to watch in New Jersey
item.description: NEW JERSEY (PX11) -- It's been one of the most notable years for New Jersey politics in recent memory — indictments, upsets, and loss are just some themes of what has been a year that could shape the Garden State's political future for years to come.
item.dc:creator: Jim Vasil, PIX 11

item.title: Clyburn calls Project 2025 a 'Jim Crow 2.0'
item.description: Rep. James Clyburn (D-S.C.) on Sunday called the conservative policy agenda Project 2025 a “Jim Crow 2.0.” Clyburn said on CNN's "State of the Union" that he was the ninth Black lawmaker elected to Congress from South Carolina — almost 100 years after the previous Black lawmaker was elected.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, NewsNation

item.title: What we know about arrest outside Trump’s California rally
item.description: Riverside County Sheriff Chad Bianco, a noted supporter of Trump, discussed safety measures taken at the Saturday event.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, NewsNation

item.title: Donald Trump holds a rally in California, a state he's almost certain to lose
item.description: The White House election is expected to come down to battlegrounds such as Wisconsin and Pennsylvania.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Trump hears at a Latino campaign event from someone who lived in the US illegally
item.description: Minutes after Donald Trump delivered his standard warnings about drug dealers and criminals illegally crossing the border during a Saturday campaign event, the former president heard from someone who was once in the country illegally but now plans to vote for him.
item.dc:creator: THOMAS BEAUMONT and NICHOLAS RICCARDI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Biden suggests Trump 'get a life' after false hurricane claims
item.description: “Mr. President Trump, former President Trump, get a life man, help these people,” Biden said in remarks on Hurricane Milton from the White House.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, Fox 5

item.title: NJ assemblyman's car stolen, house broken into
item.description: HAZLET, N.J. (PIX11) - Video from the home where a New Jersey assemblyman is currently living shows alleged burglars break into the home and speed away with his personal car - complete with State Assembly plates.
item.dc:creator: Jim Vasil, PIX 11

item.title: Cameron CH Miller discusses his vision for Las Vegas City Council Ward 5
item.description: Cameron CH Miller, a Democratic state assemblyman and candidate for Las Vegas City Council, shared his plans and priorities for Ward 5 on 8 News Now’s Daily Voting Guide.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, KLAS, CBS News
